Title: Setup Next.js 14 frontend skeleton
Body: Create base Next.js App Router structure under autowash-frontend with workspace separation for customer, operations, and admin.

Title: Setup Spring Boot backend skeleton
Body: Create modular monolith backend structure under autowash-backend with com.autowash package modules and base application bootstrapping.

Title: Configure shared frontend constants and validators
Body: Add constants.ts, validators.ts, and basic utility formatting functions aligned with PROJECT.md.

Title: Design API response contracts and TypeScript types
Body: Define frontend API wrappers and core DTO types for auth, user, booking, loyalty, and vehicles.

Title: Implement auth store and route protection
Body: Create Zustand auth store, AuthGuard, and middleware role routing for customer, staff, and admin.

Title: Build login page flow
Body: Implement login form, validation, token handling contract, and role redirect behavior.

Title: Build registration and OTP flow
Body: Implement register, verify OTP, resend, and forgot-password pages based on auth epic mapping.

Title: Create backend auth module endpoints
Body: Implement register, login, refresh, logout, OTP, and forgot-password APIs with JWT and RBAC.

Title: Build customer profile and settings pages
Body: Implement profile page, settings page, and preference persistence with server-state hooks.

Title: Implement backend user profile and preferences APIs
Body: Create user module endpoints for profile fetch, update, and preferences management.

Title: Build customer vehicles list and add vehicle flow
Body: Implement vehicle listing, primary badge, and add vehicle page with client validation.

Title: Build vehicle detail and edit page
Body: Implement vehicle detail page, immutable plate behavior, and delete handling UI.

Title: Implement backend vehicle CRUD APIs
Body: Create vehicle module endpoints for create, list, detail, update, delete, and set-primary.

Title: Scaffold booking checkout store and stepper
Body: Create booking.store.ts and checkout stepper shell for the 7-step booking flow.

Title: Build booking step 1 to step 4 UI
Body: Implement vehicle selection, package/combo selection, add-ons, and date/time steps.

Title: Build booking step 5 to step 7 UI
Body: Implement voucher validation input, payment selection, confirmation summary, and success state.

Title: Implement backend booking APIs
Body: Create booking module endpoints for create booking, list, detail, cancel, voucher validate, and payment action.

Title: Build customer bookings history and detail pages
Body: Implement bookings list with filters and booking detail page with current status mapping.

Title: Build operations queue Kanban page
Body: Implement staff queue page with 4 columns, polling, priority badges, and session links.

Title: Build check-in and wash session pages
Body: Implement check-in verification, start wash, complete wash, and timer UI.

Title: Implement backend wash session and queue APIs
Body: Create operation module endpoints for queue, create session, check-in, start, complete, and dashboard metrics.

Title: Build admin dashboard shell and navigation
Body: Implement admin layout, sidebar, dashboard shell, and placeholder metrics cards.

Title: Build admin bookings and customers pages
Body: Implement admin bookings list, booking detail shell, customer list, and customer detail tabs.

Title: Implement backend admin reporting and customer management APIs
Body: Create dashboard metrics, bookings, customers, status updates, and report endpoints.

Title: Build loyalty account
Body: redeem
Priority: Implement loyalty balance page, redeem voucher flow, and transaction history UI.

Title: Implement backend loyalty APIs
Body: Create account, redeem points, apply points, and loyalty transactions endpoints.

Title: Build promotions
Body: vouchers
Priority: Implement customer combo pages and admin CRUD shells for promotions, vouchers, and combos.

Title: Implement backend promotion module APIs
Body: Create CRUD APIs for promotions, vouchers, combos, packages, and add-ons.

Title: Implement notification center and reminder polling
Body: Build customer notification center, unread state, and reminder poller integration.

Title: Implement backend notification APIs and websocket events
Body: Create notification endpoints and event broadcasting for booking status, queue updates, and loyalty refresh.

Title: QA pass for booking and operations integration
Body: Validate customer booking to staff operations lifecycle and document mismatches.

Title: Create bug triage lane and regression checklist
Body: Prepare bug labels, regression checklist, and testing workflow for GitHub project bug tracking.
